brake_loaded_action_payload.refusal: Refuse the gate-side repeat as the default next repair. It would only add another verbal handoff to a pallet that is already missing a durable ripeness record.
brake_loaded_action_payload.mechanism_reframe: The repeated mechanism is fragmented handoff capture: each pickup is being patched by a different local witness or relay, so the operation keeps substituting person-to-person repetition for a single authoritative pallet-level record.
brake_loaded_action_payload.upstream_next_action: Move the decision upstream to establish one required ripeness capture point before pallet release, owned by the orchard-to-depot handover process rather than by the gate interaction.

turns.answer:
Refuse the gate-side repeat as the default next repair. It would only add another verbal handoff to a pallet that is already missing a durable ripeness record.

The repeated mechanism is fragmented handoff capture: each pickup is being patched by a different local witness or relay, so the operation keeps substituting person-to-person repetition for a single authoritative pallet-level record.

Move the decision upstream to establish one required ripeness capture point before pallet release, owned by the orchard-to-depot handover process rather than by the gate interaction.

brake_loaded_action_payload.refusal: Refuse the gate-side repeat as the default next repair. It would only add another verbal handoff to a pallet that is already missing a durable ripeness record.
brake_loaded_action_payload.mechanism_reframe: The repeated mechanism is fragmented handoff capture: each pickup is being patched by a different local witness or relay, so the operation keeps substituting person-to-person repetition for a single authoritative pallet-level record.
brake_loaded_action_payload.upstream_next_action: Move the decision upstream to establish one required ripeness capture point before pallet release, owned by the orchard-to-depot handover process rather than by the gate interaction.

final_answer:
Refuse the gate-side repeat as the default next repair. It would only add another verbal handoff to a pallet that is already missing a durable ripeness record.

The repeated mechanism is fragmented handoff capture: each pickup is being patched by a different local witness or relay, so the operation keeps substituting person-to-person repetition for a single authoritative pallet-level record.

Move the decision upstream to establish one required ripeness capture point before pallet release, owned by the orchard-to-depot handover process rather than by the gate interaction.
